title: Senior Radiologist at Bombay Hospital South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Senior Radiologist at Bombay Hospital South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Radiologist looking for your next big career move? Bombay Hospital South Asia Partners in Ranchi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Bombay Hospital South Asia Partners:
Bombay Hospital South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Medical Coding

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bombay Hospital South Asia Partners!
